mentions.note: Finally getting due; remarkable job; stepson worked there; Eric Yuan respected; can go higher; you've got a winner.

Best growth in years; Q2 guidance raised; AI Companion +184% YoY, My Notes 1.5M users in 4 months; trades 15x earnings; platform expanding to enterprise automation, contact center, AI; $51M Anthropic stake potential upside.

COVID-era profiteer became damaged company as growth opportunity evaporated post-vaccination; fell $588 (Oct 2020 peak) to $70s within two years; exemplifies why broken business models never recover and catching falling knives fails.
